[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / createVector

# Method: createVector()

```ts
createVector(
   x?, 
   y?, 
   z?): TextmodeVector;
```

Create a mutable vector.

Vectors are useful for positions, velocity, acceleration, flow fields,
and other creative-coding motion math.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `x?` | `number` | X component. |
| `y?` | `number` | Y component. |
| `z?` | `number` | Z component. |

## Returns

[`TextmodeVector`](../../TextmodeVector.md)

A new TextmodeVector instance.
